name_en: SAILOR Extra Small Logo Print Calfskin Handbag. Logo print, calfskin trim, fabric lining. Crossbody or shoulder. Leather drawstring closure. 1 main compartment. Adjustable strap, min 18in (45cm) max 21in (54cm). Model: 10M742. Dimensions: 13*18*11
